intents.question: Hello!
intents.answer: Hey there! Welcome to Kaal Chatbot. I can help you learn about our features, pricing, or schedule a demo. What would you like to know?

intents.question: What are your pricing plans?
intents.answer:
We offer three plans:

- Starter: Free for up to 500 chats/month. Great for personal sites.
- Pro ($49/mo): Unlimited chats, custom branding, lead capture, and analytics.
- Enterprise: Custom pricing with SLA, dedicated support, and SSO.

Want us to recommend the best fit for your use case? Share your details and we will get back to you!

intents.question: What can Kaal Chatbot do?
intents.answer:
Kaal Chatbot is an AI-powered website assistant that:

- Greets visitors automatically and engages them in conversation
- Answers FAQs instantly using your knowledge base
- Captures leads with a smooth inline form when visitors ask about demos
- Qualifies opportunities and hands off to your team when needed
- Works 24/7, always on-brand, fast, and reliable

It embeds on any site with a single script tag and supports full customization.

intents.question: Can I see a live demo?
intents.answer: Absolutely! We would love to walk you through Kaal Chatbot. Share your name and email below, and we will schedule a personalized demo within one business day.

intents.question: How can I contact your team?
intents.answer: We would be happy to connect you with our team! You can reach us at support@kaalchatbot.com, or book a demo and someone will reach out shortly.

intents.question: Is there a free trial?
intents.answer: Yes! Our Starter plan is completely free, up to 500 chats per month with no credit card required. You can upgrade to Pro anytime to unlock advanced features like custom branding, analytics, and lead capture.

intents.question: How do I install Kaal Chatbot on my site?
intents.answer: Just add a single script tag before the closing body tag on your website. It works on any platform: HTML, React, WordPress, Shopify, Wix, and more. Customization options like brand color and position are set via data attributes on the script tag.

intents.question: Can I customize the chatbot's appearance?
intents.answer:
Yes! Kaal Chatbot is fully customizable:

- Brand color: match your site's primary color
- Position: bottom-right or bottom-left
- Greeting message: set your own welcome text
- Knowledge base: add your own Q&A pairs

Pro and Enterprise plans also support custom CSS and white-labeling.

intents.question: Thanks!
intents.answer: You're welcome! Let me know if there is anything else I can help with.

intents.question: Goodbye
intents.answer: Thanks for chatting! Feel free to come back anytime. Have a great day!

fallback: I'm not sure I have the answer to that one. Would you like me to connect you with our team? Just click Book a demo or type 'contact' to get in touch.
greeting: Hi there! I'm Kaal, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?
